task_completion.description: Open the GCompris Analog Electricity activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application is open on the screen, specifically showing the Analog Electricity workspace with available electrical components.

task_completion.description: Place a battery on the workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: A battery component has been dragged from the component menu and placed onto the main workspace.

task_completion.description: Place a light bulb on the workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: A light bulb component has been dragged from the component menu and placed onto the main workspace.

task_completion.description: Connect the battery and light bulb with wires
task_completion.visual_evidence: Wire components are visually connecting the positive and negative terminals of the battery to the terminals of the light bulb, forming a complete closed loop (series circuit).
The light bulb in the workspace is visually illuminated (e.g., colored bright yellow or showing light rays), indicating that the circuit is working.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the completed circuit
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., using scrot, gnome-screenshot, or import) or a GUI screenshot tool is visible saving the screen to the exact path '/home/ga/circuit_complete.png'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual GCompris application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively using the GCompris GUI (e.g., mouse cursor dragging components), rather than just viewing a static image or using a web browser.

integrity.description: Agent built the circuit from scratch
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the step-by-step construction of the circuit. The agent must not simply download or open a pre-existing image of a completed circuit.

integrity.description: Agent used GUI actions to build the circuit
integrity.visual_evidence: The components must be placed and connected using mouse clicks and drags within the application interface, not bypassed via terminal scripts or config file edits.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected screenshot of the completed circuit must be saved exactly to the path: /home/ga/circuit_complete.png.
